name: hierarchical-firewall
title: GCP Firewall — Hierarchical Firewall Policy
summary: Creates an organization/folder-level firewall policy with prioritized rules (allow/deny/goto_next) and associations to org or folder nodes. Rules cascade to every project beneath the attached node and evaluate **before** VPC-level rules.

governance.name: prefix
governance.description: Short organization or project prefix. First token of every resource name: {prefix}-{cloud}-{environment}-{resource-type}-{suffix}.

governance.name: environment
governance.description: Deployment environment identifier (e.g., dev, test, prod). Used in resource names.

governance.name: owner
governance.description: Team or individual that owns the deployed resources. Retained for convention parity (firewall policies are not labelable).

governance.name: cost_center
governance.description: Cost center code. Retained for convention parity (firewall policies are not labelable).

governance.name: additional_tags
governance.description: Retained for convention parity; hierarchical firewall policies do not support labels.

governance.name: name_suffix
governance.description: Final token of every resource name, used to disambiguate multiple instances of this module.

module.name: parent_node
module.description: Organization or folder node the policy attaches under, in 'organizations/<id>' or 'folders/<id>' form. Requires org-level security admin IAM.

module.name: policy_description
module.description: Human-readable description of the hierarchical firewall policy.

module.name: rules
module.type: map(object({ priority = number direction = string action = string description = optional(string) src_ip_ranges = optional(list(string), []) dest_ip_ranges = optional(list(string), []) layer4_configs = list(object({ ip_protocol = string ports = optional(list(string), []) })) target_service_accounts = optional(list(string), []) enable_logging = optional(bool, false) }))
module.description: Map of hierarchical firewall rules keyed by logical name. Rules evaluate BEFORE VPC-level rules in every project under parent_node; 'goto_next' delegates the decision downward. Hierarchical rules cannot target network tags — only service accounts.

module.name: associations
module.description: Map of logical association name to org/folder node ('organizations/<id>' or 'folders/<id>') where the policy is enforced.

outputs.name: firewall_ids
outputs.description: Map with single key 'policy' to the hierarchical firewall policy ID.

outputs.name: rule_ids
outputs.description: Map of logical rule name to firewall policy rule priority (rules are addressed by priority within the policy).

outputs.name: association_ids
outputs.description: Map of logical association name to association ID.
